source: Curated macro + crypto calendar (cryptocraft.com-style). Times are UTC.

events.title: ISM Manufacturing PMI (Dec)
events.detail: Manufacturing sector activity gauge — readings below 50 signal contraction.

events.title: ISM Services PMI (Dec)
events.detail: Services sector activity gauge — the larger share of the US economy.

events.title: US ADP Employment Change (Dec)
events.detail: Private payrolls estimate — early signal ahead of Friday's official NFP release.

events.title: US Non-Farm Payrolls (Dec)
events.detail: Monthly US jobs report — affects rate expectations and risk assets including crypto.

events.title: US CPI (Dec)
events.detail: US Consumer Price Index release — key inflation gauge for Fed policy path.

events.title: US PPI (Dec)
events.detail: US Producer Price Index — wholesale inflation, leading indicator for consumer prices.

events.title: US Retail Sales (Dec)
events.detail: Consumer spending gauge — a key driver of GDP and risk-appetite readthrough.

events.title: World Economic Forum, Davos
events.detail: Annual gathering of global political and business leaders — macro and regulatory commentary can move risk sentiment.

events.title: Bank of Japan Policy Decision
events.detail: BoJ policy rate decision — yen moves can spill into crypto risk sentiment via carry-trade flows.

events.title: US Durable Goods Orders (Dec)
events.detail: Business investment gauge tracking orders for long-lasting manufactured goods.
